questions.text: Which of the following expressions is equivalent to 2(x − 4)2 − 5x?
questions.subject: Mathematics Reasoning
questions.explanation: The equation can be solved by expanding the bracket using the formula a2- 2ab+b2 2(x − 4)2 − 5x 2(x2 -2(x)(4)+(4)2) -5x 2(x2-8x+16)-5x 2x2-16x+32-5x 2x2-21x+32 (as shown in option A) All the other answers mentioned are wrong in all the options.

questions.text: 210 oranges and 252 apples are equally packed in cartons so that no fruit is left. What is the biggest possible number of cartons needed?
questions.subject: Mathematics Reasoning

options.explanation: 210 and 252. Highest common factor is 42. 210 factors to = 2*5*3*7 252 factors to = 2*2*3*3*7 210/42 = 5 252/42 = 6 5+6= 11 cartons

questions.text: If 5(x-2)-3x=2(x-5), which of the following must be true?
questions.subject: Mathematics Reasoning

options.text: The equation is true for all values of x.
options.explanation: The correct option will equalize both sides. You should remember that we solve the brackets first in any equation. (According to BODMAS) Option A) Substituting x by 3 5(3-2) - 3*(3)=2(3-5) . 5(1) - 9 = 2(-2) - 4= - 4 Option B) 5*(4- 2) - (3)*(4)=2 (4 - 5) 5 * ( -2) - 12 = - 2 10-12=-2 - 2=- 2 Option C) 5*(5 -2) - (3)*(5)=2(5 - 5) - 15=- 15 Option D) all the answers are correct so D is the best choice

questions.explanation: The correct option will equalize both sides.You should remember that we solve the brackets first in any equation. (According to BODMAS)Option A) Substituting x by 3 5(3-2) - 3*(3)=2(3-5) . 5(1) - 9 = 2(-2) - 4= - 4 Option B) 5*(4- 2) - (3)*(4)=2 (4 - 5) 5 * ( -2) - 12 = - 2 10-12=-2 - 2=- 2 Option C) 5*(5 -2) - (3)*(5)=2(5 - 5) - 15=- 15 Option D) all the answers are correct so D is the best choice

questions.text: There are 28 tables for customers at Mesa Grill Restaurant. The tables are either two-seat tables or four-seat tables. When all the tables are full, there will be 90 customers in the restaurant. How many two-seat tables are at the restaurant?
